creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text:
Poked at this on #bsdports and we looked at the code where this lib is loaded:  https://github.com/qtproject/qt/blob/4.8/src/network/ssl/qsslsocket_openssl_symbols.cpp#L484

There are a lot of acrobatics to load the library but we are wondering if setting SHLIB_VERSION_NUMBER to the lib version of the builder will do the right thing.
